reason: Single source of truth for requirements (R1-R13), AC, technical approach, ADR, and implementation plan. Sub-agents must follow the agreed scope (no internal Windows Terminal, no video/WEBP, no built-in wallpapers).

Critical constraints for the xterm rendering pipeline: allowTransparency must be set at construction (no hot-toggle); WebglAddon compatible with transparent bg; selectionBackground needs tuning under transparency. Drives XTermTerminal.tsx changes.
Concrete recipe for the backend slice: tauri-plugin-fs 2.x direct dep, lib.rs init(), tauri.conf.json assetProtocol.scope, capabilities, save_background_image Rust command sketch. Drives PR1.

Feature spans React (XTermTerminal, settingsStore, terminalStore, ThemeSettingsPage) + Rust commands + Tauri config + asset protocol. Data flow: dialog -> Rust copy -> appLocalData -> asset URL -> CSS -> xterm. Must reason about layer boundaries.

Avoid reinventing: settings store already has migration patterns for legacy keys (LEGACY_*_MAP); terminalThemes.ts has theme resolution; ContextMenu in TerminalTabs.tsx is reusable. Search existing patterns before introducing new ones.
